# vercel_kms_issuer (Data Source)

Provides information about an existing Vercel KMS Issuer.

A KMS Issuer signs JSON Web Tokens (JWTs) and exposes a JWKS endpoint at
`https://kms.vercel.com/{id}/jwks.json`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "vercel_kms_issuer" "example" {
  id = "iss_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the issuer.

### Optional

- `team_id` (String) The ID of the team the issuer exists under. Required when reading a team resource if a default team has not been set in the provider.

### Read-Only

- `algorithm` (String) The signing algorithm used by the issuer.
- `created_at` (String) The time the issuer was created.
- `managed_by` (String) Identifies the policy that manages this issuer, if any.
- `name` (String) The name of the issuer.
- `origin` (String) The origin of the issuer's key material, either `vercel` or `external`.
- `owner_id` (String) The ID of the team that owns the issuer.
- `policies` (Attributes List) The authorization policies attached to the issuer. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies))
- `signing_keys` (Attributes List) The signing keys belonging to the issuer. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--signing_keys))
- `updated_at` (String) The time the issuer was last updated.

<a id="nestedatt--policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policies`

Read-Only:

- `client_id` (String) The client ID associated with the policy, for connex grants.
- `created_at` (String) The time the policy was created.
- `environments` (List of String) The environments the policy applies to, for project grants.
- `kind` (String) The policy kind, either `project-grant` or `connex-grant`.
- `project_id` (String) The project ID associated with the policy, for project grants.
- `team_id` (String) The team ID associated with the policy, for project grants.
- `token_claims` (String) The claims KMS includes in signed JWTs for this policy, as a JSON-encoded object.
- `updated_at` (String) The time the policy was last updated.


<a id="nestedatt--signing_keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `signing_keys`

Read-Only:

- `algorithm` (String) The signing algorithm of the key.
- `created_at` (String) The time the key was created.
- `issuer_id` (String) The ID of the issuer the key belongs to.
- `key_id` (String) The ID of the signing key. Used as the JWT/JWKS `kid`.
- `public_key` (String) The public key as a JSON-encoded JWK.
- `public_key_fingerprint` (String) The fingerprint of the public key.
- `revoke_at` (String) The time at which the key is scheduled to be revoked, if any.
- `status` (String) The status of the key, either `active` or `revoking`.
- `updated_at` (String) The time the key was last updated.
